parameters.content:
## TikTok Video to Facebook Caption Auto-Poster — WayinVideo + GPT-4o-mini + Facebook Graph API + Sheets

For social media managers, content creators, and brands who produce TikTok or short-form videos and want to automatically repurpose each one into a published Facebook post — without manually rewriting captions. Paste any TikTok, YouTube, or short-form video URL via the form. WayinVideo transcribes the full video content. A plain text version of the transcript (without speaker labels) is sent to GPT-4o-mini which writes an engaging Facebook post caption — with a hook, short paragraphs, a CTA, optional video link, and up to 8 hashtags — following Facebook best practices for engagement. The caption is posted directly to your Facebook Page via the Graph API. Every post is logged to Google Sheets with the Post ID, Post URL, character count, and Posted status.

## How it works
- **1. Form — Video URL + Details** collects the video URL, title, brand name, target audience, post tone, and whether to include the video link
- **2. WayinVideo — Submit Transcription** submits the URL for transcription
- **3. Wait — 60 Seconds** gives the API initial processing time
- **4. WayinVideo — Get Transcript Results** polls for the task result
- **5. IF — Transcription Complete?** checks for SUCCEEDED — if not, retries via 30-second wait
- **7. Code — Format Transcript** formats speaker-labeled text and also builds a plain text version for caption writing
- **8. AI Agent — Write Facebook Caption** uses GPT-4o-mini with 10 Facebook writing rules to produce a caption, hashtags, and character count in labeled sections
- **10. Code — Parse Caption Output** extracts caption, hashtags, and character count via regex and builds the full post message
- **11. HTTP — Post to Facebook** posts the caption to the Facebook Page feed via Graph API v19
- **12. Google Sheets — Log Post** appends one row with all fields including Post ID and constructed Post URL

## Set up steps
1. In **2. WayinVideo — Submit Transcription** and **4. WayinVideo — Get Transcript Results** — replace YOUR_WAYINVIDEO_API_KEY
2. In **9. OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **11. HTTP — Post to Facebook** — replace YOUR_FACEBOOK_PAGE_ID in the URL and YOUR_FACEBOOK_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN in the body
4. In **12. Google Sheets — Log Post** — connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential and replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID
5. Create a Google Sheet tab named Facebook Posts with columns: Video URL, Video Title, Brand / Page, Facebook Caption, Hashtags, Character Count, Post ID, Post URL, Status, Posted On

## Form Input
User submits video URL, title, brand name, target audience, post tone, and whether to include the video link. All six fields feed into the transcript formatter and AI caption prompt.

## WayinVideo Transcription Submit and Poll
Submits the video URL for transcription. Waits 60 seconds for initial processing. Polls the results endpoint until status equals SUCCEEDED.

nodes.name: Section — Status Check and Retry Loop

parameters.content:
## Transcription Status Check and Retry Loop
IF checks for SUCCEEDED status. TRUE proceeds to transcript formatting. FALSE waits 30 seconds and polls again. Loop continues until the transcript is ready.

nodes.name: Section — Transcript Formatting and AI Caption Writing

parameters.content:
## Transcript Formatting and AI Caption Writing
Builds both a speaker-labeled transcript and a clean plain text version. GPT-4o-mini uses the plain text to write a Facebook caption with hook, short paragraphs, CTA, optional video link, and up to 8 hashtags following 10 Facebook engagement rules.

nodes.name: Section — Caption Parse, Facebook Post, and Sheet Log

parameters.content:
## Caption Parse, Facebook Post, and Sheet Log
Regex extracts caption, hashtags, and character count. HTTP posts the full message to the Facebook Page feed via Graph API v19. Google Sheets logs every post with Post ID, constructed Post URL, and Posted status.

values.placeholder: e.g. 5 Morning Habits That Changed My Life
e.g. Incrementors, My Fitness Brand, TechStartup
e.g. Small business owners, fitness enthusiasts, tech professionals
e.g. Inspiring and motivational / Informative / Funny and casual / Professional

parameters.formDescription: Paste your TikTok or video URL. AI will transcribe the content and automatically write and post a Facebook caption to your Page.

options.systemMessage:
=You are an expert Facebook content writer who specializes in writing high-engagement posts for brands and creators.

Your job is to read the video transcript below and write a compelling Facebook post caption that drives likes, comments, and shares.

---

## VIDEO DETAILS
- Video Title: {{ $json.videoTitle }}
- Brand / Page: {{ $json.brandName }}
- Target Audience: {{ $json.targetAudience }}
- Post Tone: {{ $json.postTone }}
- Video Duration: {{ $json.totalMinutes }} minutes
- Include Video Link: {{ $json.includeLink }}
- Video URL: {{ $json.videoUrl }}

---

## FACEBOOK POST WRITING RULES
1. Write ONLY from what is said in the video transcript — no invented content
2. Start with a strong HOOK in the first line — make people stop scrolling. Use a question, a bold statement, or a surprising fact.
3. Keep paragraphs short — 1-2 sentences maximum. Facebook readers skim.
4. Use line breaks between each paragraph for readability
5. Match the tone specified above consistently throughout
6. End with a clear CTA — ask people to comment, share, tag someone, or click a link
7. Add emojis naturally — not too many, only where they add energy
8. Total post length: 150-300 words — long enough to engage, short enough to read
9. If Include Video Link = Yes — add the video URL naturally at the end of the post
10. Hashtags must be relevant and lowercase — no more than 8 hashtags

---

## OUTPUT FORMAT
Return your response in this exact structure — use these exact labels:

FACEBOOK CAPTION:
[Write the full Facebook post caption here — hook, body paragraphs, CTA, optional video link]

HASHTAGS:
[List 5-8 relevant hashtags — lowercase — space separated]

CHARACTER COUNT:
[Total character count of the caption only — not including hashtags]

---

Now read the video transcript and write the Facebook post caption:
